canonical_definition: A multilingual dataset for measuring gender stereotypes in 30 European languages, consisting of gendered minimal sentence pairs (EuroGESTG) and gender-neutral sentences (EuroGESTN) that can be placed in gendered templates.
papers: Rapid Word Learning Through Meta In-Context Learning

definitions.paper: Rapid Word Learning Through Meta In-Context Learning
